faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about MeetCIP
faq.a1: MeetCIP uses advanced AI to answer your business phone calls 24/7. When a customer calls, our AI greets them professionally, answers their questions using your business information, captures their details, and notifies you instantly. You can customize responses, set business hours, and train the AI with your specific FAQs.
faq.q2: Can MeetCIP handle calls in Spanish?
faq.a2: Yes! MeetCIP is fully bilingual in English and Spanish. It automatically detects the caller's language and responds naturally in that language. This is included in all plans at no extra cost.
faq.q3: What happens to the calls MeetCIP answers?
faq.a3: Every call is recorded (with proper disclosure), transcribed, and logged in your dashboard. You'll receive instant notifications for high-priority calls, and can review all call transcripts, recordings, and caller information anytime. Everything is searchable and exportable.
faq.q4: Does MeetCIP really sound human? Will customers know it's AI?
faq.a4: MeetCIP uses advanced voice AI that sounds natural and conversational. Most customers don't realize they're speaking with AI. The system is trained to handle interruptions, ask clarifying questions, and maintain a professional, friendly tone in both English and Spanish.
faq.q5: How quickly can I get set up?
faq.a5: Most businesses are live within 24-48 hours. Setup includes: (1) Choosing your plan, (2) Connecting your phone number, (3) Training the AI on your business details, (4) Testing calls. Our team handles the technical work — you just provide information about your services.
faq.q6: What happens if MeetCIP can't answer a question?
faq.a6: If a caller asks something outside MeetCIP's knowledge, it will politely explain that it needs to connect them with your team, take their contact information, and immediately notify you. You maintain full control and can always jump into any conversation.

bilingualSupport.title: Truly Bilingual
bilingualSupport.description: Seamlessly switches between English and Spanish mid-conversation

crmAI.title: CRM + AI Combined
crmAI.description: The only answering service that runs your full CRM — caller recognition, service history, and personalized AI greetings built in

faq.q1: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.a1: Yes! You can change plans anytime. Upgrades take effect immediately, and downgrades apply at your next billing cycle.
faq.q2: What happens if I exceed my call limit?
faq.a2: We'll notify you at 80% and 100% usage. Additional calls are billed at $0.50-$0.99 per call depending on your plan, or you can upgrade anytime.
faq.a3: No, calls reset each billing cycle. However, if you consistently use fewer calls than your plan includes, we'll recommend a more cost-effective plan.
faq.a4: No setup fees for any plan. We believe in transparent pricing with no hidden costs.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Discover) and ACH transfers for annual plans.
faq.a6: No long-term contracts required. All plans are month-to-month except Enterprise, which offers flexible annual agreements with volume discounts.

about.title: Empowering Small Businesses
about.subtitle: We believe every business deserves enterprise-grade customer service technology.
about.missionPara1: MeetCIP was founded on a simple observation: small businesses lose thousands of dollars every year from missed calls. Whether it's after hours, during busy periods, or when staff is unavailable, every missed call is a lost opportunity.
about.missionPara2: We created MeetCIP to help small businesses provide excellent customer service without hiring additional staff. Now any business can answer every call, 24/7—without the overhead costs or complexity.
